allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Sleep 4; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:5173' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Message }")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$tmpDir = 'C:\\Users\\itaux\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pw-test'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path \\$tmpDir | Out-Null
Set-Location \\$tmpDir
'{\\"name\\":\\"pw-test\\",\\"version\\":\\"1.0.0\\"}' | Out-File package.json -Encoding UTF8
npm install playwright --prefer-offline 2>&1 | Select-String -NotMatch 'npm warn'
Write-Host 'DONE'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3100 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess
if \(\\$procs\) { \\$procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
Start-Sleep 1
Write-Host 'Old backend killed'
")
